name: Materialise OnSite
description: Materialise OnSite 3D printing API for technology/material lookup, products, pricing, quotations, addresses, and order placement. i.materialise has moved into the Materialise OnSite service.

credential_fields.name: access_token
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Materialise OnSite OAuth access token. Get it from https://auth.onsite.materialise.com/connect/token using your client credentials.

tools.name: upload_model
tools.description: Upload a 3D model file to Materialise OnSite and receive a model id. The file is sent as multipart/form-data.

file.description: 3D model bytes as base64, data URL, or raw string.

filename.description: Filename with extension. Materialise supports common 3D model formats on the OnSite API.

tools.name: list_technologies
tools.description: List Materialise OnSite technologies, materials, finishings, and colors. Use the returned ids to create products.

tools.name: get_model
tools.description: Get dimensions, volume, surface area, filename, and status for an uploaded model.

tools.name: get_model_status
tools.description: Check processing status for an uploaded model.

tools.name: create_product
tools.description: Create a printable product from a processed model and selected technology/material/finishing/color ids.

tools.name: get_product_services
tools.description: Get available production services for a product, such as default or FastLane.

tools.name: get_product_price
tools.description: Price a product for a quantity and currency.

tools.name: create_delivery_address
tools.description: Create a delivery address and receive an address id usable on quotations.

tools.name: create_quotation
tools.description: Create an empty quotation in a currency. Add items and addresses before ordering.

tools.name: get_quotation
tools.description: Get quotation details including items, totals, status, transport cost, and tracking number when available.

tools.name: delete_quotation
tools.description: Delete an active quotation that has not been ordered. This is destructive; inspect it first and do not retry after a successful deletion.

tools.name: add_quotation_addresses
tools.description: Assign delivery and invoice address ids to a quotation.

tools.name: add_quotation_item
tools.description: Add a product and quantity to a quotation.

tools.name: delete_quotation_item
tools.description: Remove an item from a quotation.

tools.name: place_order
tools.description: Place a billable order for a fully configured quotation. Invoice ordering must be enabled on the Materialise account; inspect quotation totals, items, addresses, currency, and service before calling, and check get_quotation after an ambiguous response before retrying.
